level_a_graph_events.note: Run with TRIBUNUS_PROJECTION_ATTRIBUTION=1. Instrumentation gated behind env var; zero overhead when disabled. Graph-construction only — no eval or sync inside projection timers.

level_b_isolated_results.note: Warm MLX quantized kernel is fast (~0.4-1.7ms per projection). Cold tax is 15-30× per projection. Custom Metal kernel is NOT the next treatment candidate for warm path.

level_c_metal_capture.capture_scaffold: CaptureGuard with module-scope atomic, finish() returns CaptureReceipt with SHA-256, existing output path rejection, Drop as panic cleanup
level_c_metal_capture.ffi_bindings: mlx_metal_start_capture/stop_capture via external C linkage, cfg(target_os = macos) guarded
level_c_metal_capture.note: Capture not yet run. Whole-decode capture only; layer-scoped capture requires executor-level start/stop boundary. No Metal signposts or debug groups implemented — attribution via deterministic invocation order only.

dtype_contract.byte_invariants: all consistent across manifest and MLX array
dtype_contract.not_a_defect: External-array bridge is correct. U32 is the quantized_matmul kernel ABI requirement.

control_b_pipeline_warm.mechanism: pipeline warm helps (same layer, pages already faulted)

control_c_page_touch.mechanism: page residency helps (same layer, volatile page-stride reads)

control_d_layer_specificity.mechanism: tensor-specific — warming L12 does not warm L13 in same process

control_e_unload_reload.mechanism: cache is model-runtime scoped, not process-scoped

five_control_causal_matrix.conclusion: Tensor-specific first-use tax survives both pipeline warming and page pre-touch. Multiple mechanisms contribute — page residency, Metal/MLX resource initialization, hidden copies. No single dominant cause identified. Level C Metal capture required to isolate remaining mechanisms.

authorization_detail.custom_metal_kernel: NOT AUTHORIZED — warm MLX quantized kernel is fast (0.4-1.7ms). Cold tax dominates, not arithmetic.
authorization_detail.runtime_canonical_copy: NOT AUTHORIZED — no evidence that contiguous copy changes latency. External arrays are already U32 packed-word.
authorization_detail.compiler_prepacked_layout: NOT AUTHORIZED — dtype contract is correct (U32 packed-word). No layout defect found.
authorization_detail.bounded_prefetch: NOT AUTHORIZED — page pre-touch alone does not eliminate cold tax. Multiple mechanisms unresolved.
authorization_detail.metal_capture_level_c: AUTHORIZED AS NEXT STEP — capture required to identify hidden copies, buffer initialization, resource creation, kernel selection, and Metal pipeline events inside the evaluation boundary.
authorization_detail.next_mission: Run one whole-decode Metal capture to verify FFI and inspect general command structure. Then narrow capture to one sliding layer and one full-attention layer with logical-operation sidecar map.

model_runtime.description: Cache tied to loaded MLX arrays. Survives layer change, does not survive model unload.

projection_invocation.description: Warm after first call within same loaded model.

tensor_specific.description: Each layer's mapped pages incur independent first-use cost.

unaccounted_duration.note: Isolated warm projections sum to 8.27ms but integrated layer eval is 596.5ms. The gap includes attention, normalization, activation, KV, synchronization, and queued upstream operations. Cannot be reconciled until Level C capture attributes the integrated Metal command stream.

next_safe_action: Run exploratory whole-decode Metal capture to verify capture FFI works. Then implement layer-scoped capture (start/stop at executor level) and run one sliding + one full-attention layer capture. Produce integrated GPU ledger reconciling captured kernel durations with the 596.5ms layer evaluation interval.
